title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
